entities.name: CLIMATE SMART AGRICULTURE (CSA)
entities.description: Agricultural technologies designed to increase productivity and resilience to climate change

entities.description: A district in Malawi where the study was conducted

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: The health and nutrient status of the soil

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary cereal crop evaluated for yield

entities.name: MAIZE YIELD
entities.description: The amount of maize produced per unit area

entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE (CA)
entities.description: A farming system that minimizes soil disturbance and maintains soil cover

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in intercropping with maize

entities.name: MAIZE-PIGEONPEA INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing maize and pigeonpea together

entities.name: MBEYA FERTILIZATION
entities.description: A local organic and inorganic soil amendment practice

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a system to recover from shocks

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting to climate change

entities.name: PARTICULATE ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: A component of soil organic matter

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON (SOC)
entities.description: The carbon stored in soil organic matter

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: An essential soil nutrient

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: An essential soil nutrient

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: An essential soil nutrient

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: An essential soil nutrient

entities.name: MAGNESIUM
entities.description: An essential soil nutrient

entities.name: BULK DENSITY
entities.description: The mass of soil per unit volume

entities.name: ANNUAL BIOMASS INPUTS
entities.description: The amount of organic matter added to the soil annually

entities.name: WATER INFILTRATION
entities.description: The process by which water on the ground surface enters the soil

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL FARMER PRACTICES
entities.description: Standard farming methods used as a baseline for comparison

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE MITIGATION
entities.description: Efforts to reduce or prevent emission of greenhouse gases

entities.name: CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing atmospheric carbon dioxide

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand water shortage

entities.name: TIMELY WEEDING
entities.description: The practice of removing weeds at the optimal time

entities.name: OPTIMUM PLANT POPULATIONS
entities.description: The ideal number of plants per unit area

entities.name: GROSS MARGINS
entities.description: The difference between total revenue and variable costs

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE SHOCKS
entities.description: Extreme weather events caused by climate change
